notes:
- New Watchlist states: Paused and Dropped (fully integrated with AniList pull/sync).
- Improved Watching classification: entries with real progress no longer fall into Planned.
- Large-list performance fix: reduced UI freezes/unresponsive behavior on very large watchlists.
- Automatic watchlist deduplication (prefers better entries and covered entries when appropriate).
- More robust AniList import: improved title matching (romaji/english/synonyms + season handling), fewer missing anime.
- Better AniList placeholder handling: unmatched entries no longer disappear.
- General stability fixes and cleanup.
